nasb.text: Urge bondslaves to be subject to their own masters in everything, to be well-pleasing, not argumentative,

esv.text: Bondservants are to be submissive to their own masters in everything; they are to be well-pleasing, not argumentative,

cnv.text: 作奴僕的，要凡事順服自己的主人，討他歡喜，不要頂嘴。

ccb.text: 劝勉做奴仆的要凡事顺服主人，让主人满意，不顶撞主人，

csbs.text: 奴仆要在一切事上服从自己的主人、讨主人喜悦，不可顶嘴、
